The '''Meltdown Café''' was a seedy restaurant/drinking establishment on [[Level 88]] in the [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian Sector]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] and owned by [[Uralak]]<ref name="Lords of Nal Hutta" />. Along with [[Slag Pit/Legends|The Slag Pit]] and [[The Burning Deck]], it was one of the moon's three most popular [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] hangouts.

The Café was famous for selling bitter, syrupy drinks known as ''[[Tatooine Sunburn]]s''. Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], [[Spurch Goa|Spurch "Warhog" Goa]], met with a young [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] named [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]]. He bought him lunch at the Meltdown Café and promised to teach him everything he knew about the bounty hunting trade.

The Meltdown Cafe's special was [[krayt milk]] and [[dianoga pie]].
